title: March 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 16''' is the 75th day of the year (76th in leap years). There are 290 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Judah Friedlander]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Todd Nauck]] is born.
*1971 – [[Alan Tudyk]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Ayesha Dharker]] is born.
*1977 – [[John Williams]] concludes conducting and recording of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[musical score]].
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars:]]'' "[[Black Knight, White Princess, and Pawns]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 91|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 91]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2002]] – ''[[CinéMagique]]'' opens.
*[[2005]] – [[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 1]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (TPB)|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' trade paperback]] published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Insider 116|''Star Wars Insider'' 116]] published.
*2010 – ''[[Threat of the Conqueror]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – "[[Revenge (episode)|Revenge]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – [[Steve Moore]] dies.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Forgotten Droid]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 16|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 16]] published in Germany.
*[[2019]] – "[[Yoda – The Jedi Master]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Kylo Ren and Other Followers of the Dark Side]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Halcyon Legacy 2|''Halcyon Legacy'' 2]] published.
